case_title: KONKOFF, HERBERT vs. WARDE, IBRAHIM et al

docket_entries.description: PRO TEM LARRY CURTICE;LMORALES-REPORTER,JWILLIS-MCGHEE,CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; CASE SETTLES TERMS OF SETTLEMENT READ INTO RECORD AS FOLL: PLTF ENTITLED TO JUDGMT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 720 2ND AVE. #201, SF, CA; FORF OF RENTAL AGREE; DEFT TO PAY PLTF THE SUM OF $3000. ON OR BEFORE THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 9/24/99; IF DEFT PAYS AMT PLTF WILL WAIVE ANY BACK RENT AND DAMAGES OVER AND ABOVE THE $3000; WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED BUT STYD TO 12/7/99 MIDNIGHT; IF DEFT FAILS TO MAKE $3000 PYMT PLTF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMT IN THE AMT OF $789.57 BACK RENT & DAMAGES OF $26.31 P/DAY FROM 9/1/99 THRU VACATING DATE; NO FURTHER STYS; WAIVES ALL CLAIMS; EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COST AND ATTY FEES IF DEFT PAYS $3000. AS SPECIFIED IN AGREEMENT; SEC. DEP WILL BE DEALT W/BY LAW; ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED; PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN COND; IF DEFT COMPLIES W/ALL TERMS PLTF AGREES TO SIGNED DISM W/PREJUDICE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT WARDE, IBRAHIM

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONKOFF, HERBERT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-21-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-27-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WARDE, IBRAHIM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARDE, IBRAHIM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 720 2ND AVENUE #201, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-07-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT(S) DOES NOT VACATE BY 7 DEC 99 OR PAY $3000 IN TIMELY MANNER, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT AGAINST DEF(S) FOR $789.57 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES OF $26.31 PER DAY FROM SEPT, PLUS REASONALBLE ATTY FEES AND COSTS PER COST BILL.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONKOFF, HERBERT AS TO DEFENDANT WARDE, IBRAHIM DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
